label: Seasonal Gutter Cleaning
description: Creates a maintenance task for gutter cleaning at each property when seasonally appropriate for the property's location.
hint: Checks weekly; an LLM decides the right timing based on each property's climate and location.
script:
name: "Seasonal Gutter Cleaning"
description: >
  Checks each property weekly and creates a gutter cleaning task
  when the timing is right for the property's climate and location.

schedule:
  interval: weekly

scope:
  resource: property

actions:
  - type: create_task
    llm_gate:
      prompt: >
        Today is {{today}}.
        Property location: {{property.address_line1}}, {{property.city}}, {{property.state}} {{property.postal_code}}.
        Gutter cleaning is typically needed in spring (after pollen/seed season)
        and fall (after leaf drop), or roughly every 4 months in heavily
        wooded or high-rainfall areas.
        Based on this property's location and climate, is NOW a good time
        to schedule gutter cleaning?
    subject: "Gutter cleaning due: {{property.address_line1}}"
    category: maintenance
    urgency: low
    require_vendor_type: Landscaper
    body: >
      Gutters at {{property.address_line1}}, {{property.city}}, {{property.state}}
      are due for seasonal cleaning based on local climate conditions.
